title: Graphic Designer: Media and Marketing
intro: Design the vision behind FOSIS's national campaigns. As our Graphic Designer, you'll shape how Muslim students across the UK see and engage with the federation — from social media to print, events to advocacy.

impact.title: High-Impact Visuals
impact.description: Design stunning posters, social assets, and campaign materials for national initiatives like Discover Islam Week and Ihsaan Careers.

impact.title: Creative Quality Control
impact.description: Act as the ultimate brand guardian, ensuring every visual output meets FOSIS's professional and Islamic standards.

impact.title: Campaign Support
impact.description: Work closely with the communications team to bring creative concepts to life across digital and print channels.

closing: If you have the eye for detail, a portfolio that speaks for itself, and a passion for serving the Ummah through design — we want to hear from you.

title: Team Member: Student Engagement
intro: Help FOSIS connect with Muslim students nationwide. As a Student Engagement team member, you'll support outreach, events, and initiatives that bring students closer to their ISocs and the wider FOSIS network.

impact.title: Student Outreach
impact.description: Support campaigns and communications that reach Muslim students across campuses in your region and nationally.

impact.title: Event Coordination
impact.description: Assist with planning and delivery of student-facing events, webinars, and engagement activities throughout the year.

impact.title: Community Building
impact.description: Help foster a sense of belonging and connection among Muslim students through creative engagement initiatives.

closing: If you're passionate about student welfare, community, and making a tangible difference on campus — we'd love to hear from you.
